theme: A Festival or Event You Attended

sentences.english: Describe a festival or cultural event you attended.
The most memorable event I've attended was the Boryeong Mud Festival on the west coast of Korea.
sentences.korean: 참석한 가장 기억에 남는 행사는 한국 서해안의 보령 머드 축제였어요.

sentences.english: Thousands of people covered in mud were wrestling sliding and throwing mud at each other while laughing uncontrollably.
sentences.korean: 진흙으로 뒤덮인 수천 명이 제어할 수 없이 웃으며 레슬링 슬라이딩 진흙 던지기를 하고 있었어요.

sentences.english: What made it so special was how it broke down all social barriers.
sentences.korean: 특별하게 만든 것은 모든 사회적 장벽을 허물었다는 점이에요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Festival or Event You Attended
Why is empathy important in today's society?

theme: A Festival or Event You Attended

sentences.english: When everyone is covered in mud age nationality and social status simply disappear.
sentences.korean: 모두가 진흙으로 뒤덮이면 나이 국적 사회적 지위가 그냥 사라져요.

sentences.english: I made friends with people from six different countries that day and it reminded me how powerful shared experiences can be.
sentences.korean: 그날 6개국 사람들과 친구가 됐고 공유된 경험이 얼마나 강력한지 상기시켜줬어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Festival or Event You Attended
At what age do you think people should get married
